titleStmt.title: SII 35.117: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 117. (A.R. No. 60 of 1952-53.) SAVAṆŪR, BANKAPUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into a wall Prānti office.
This inscription is dated in Śaka 1520, Viḷambi, Kārttika śu. 7, corresponding to A.D. 1598, November 25, Saturday.
It records the excavation of a well near the village Nīlage by Khāneājam Khursitakhān, the chief of Baṅkāpur fort, for the merit of king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ . śrīmatu jayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakava
ruṣa 1520 neya viḷaṁbināmasaṁvatsarada kā
¨rtika śudha 7 yalu hajarayitibarāyima Adalu śā
pādaśahāsāhēbarige puṁṇyavāgabēkeṁdu baṁkāpu
rada du¨rgādhipati khāneAjaṁkhurasitakhānaru nīlage grā
mada samīpadalli sumuhū¨rthadiṁda kaṭṭisida bāvige maṁgaḷa mahā
ślōka . vāpīkūpataṭākādiṁ ka¨rtumichaṁti yē narāṁ . Araṁṇyē
ni¨rjarē dēśē pathichāyādiva¨rjitē . 1 . tatra ku¨rvaṁti yē
lōkā dha¨rmani¨rvāṇa saṁgrahaḥ . 2 . tatsa¨rvaṁ kathayiṣyāmi sa
¨rvapuṁṇyēṣu yōdhikaṁ . tathāḥ yāvaśvaṁdraśya sū¨ryaśya yā
vattiṣṭaṁtti mēdinī . tatpuṁṇyāni va¨rddhaṁti tē vasaṁti nabhastalē . dha
¨rmakā¨ryēṣu vighnāni yē ku¨rvaṁti narādhamā tē vasaṁti yamaḥ
ghōrē ravaravē narakē sadā . 5 . śubhaṁ
Digital edition of SII 35.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
